title: Hello, Hello Kits from Studio Calico
excerpt: Hello, Hello! I may say this every single day to myself and a little too much on this blog, but man is time flying. The Hello, Hello kits from Studio Calico are awesome. Grey with pops of rainbow colors? Black…
body:
Hello, Hello! I may say this every single day to myself and a little too much on this blog, but man is time flying. The Hello, Hello kits from Studio Calico are awesome. Grey with pops of rainbow colors? Black and Kal Barteski script thrown in? Yes, please! I've had these photos in place for this Project Life spread for a while now. What I love about these kits, is that they are so versatile and I can spend just a bit of time on embellishing and journaling, and then it's come together quite nicely. Going for simple here folks, especially now that Jack is on the move big time. Seems like so long ago that these photos were taken, so I am glad to have finally wrapped up this spread using the Project Life kit.

Here are a couple layouts made with the main Scrapbook kit and some of the add-on's. The photos are from my BFF's wedding, taken by Sunglow Photography. There will be plenty more goodness from this gorgeous event. You can click on the layouts to find out exactly which kits were used.The next 2 layouts were made only with the scrapbook kit. Here is how this layout came together.You can shop for all the Hello, Hello kits here and see all my projects here.

Keep in mind that subscribers can shop the pre-sale each month at noon EST on the 27th. Others need to wait until the clock strikes midnight tonight. Become a subscriber and get in on all the benefits and rewards that Studio Calico has to offer!
